flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Maranatha Baptist University are 18% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($45.6k vs $55.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Maranatha Baptist University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.1k → $21.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Maranatha Baptist University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.1k → $21.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Maranatha Baptist University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
